evals.prompt: Create a JSON API endpoint module for a Drupal 10 Open Social site (os-knowledge-garden). The module `api_status_endpoint` should provide a route at `/api/system/status` that returns a JSON response with site name and module count. The controller should use dependency injection to inject the module_handler and config.factory services. Use proper DI patterns with a create() factory method. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: Controller extending ControllerBase with create() factory, DI services, JsonResponse, route with _permission
expectations: Controller class extends ControllerBase (not bare ContainerInjectionInterface)
Controller has static create() method accepting ContainerInterface
Constructor uses typed service parameters with DI (not \Drupal::service() calls in methods)
Route YAML uses _controller key with fully qualified class name
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en api_status_endpoint returns exit code 0
The API endpoint returns JSON: navigate to /api/system/status (as admin via drush uli) and verify page contains site name or module count data (not a 404 page)
